secret.translate: тайный, секретный, потайной, скрытый, тайна, секрет, загадка

examples.eng: The secret came out.
I'll find out your secret.
It's no longer a secret.
He blurted out the secret
She had a secret sorrow.
examples.ru: У неё было горе о котором она никому не рассказывала.

examples.eng: He left the secret untold.
Her secret was out.
Her secret died with her.
examples.ru: Её тайна умерла вместе с ней.

examples.eng: The mission is top secret.
My secret will die with me.
examples.ru: Моя тайна умрёт вместе со мной.

examples.eng: They arranged to meet in secret.
He made no secret of his designs.
Can I trust you to keep a secret?
My secret will die with me!
examples.ru: Моя тайна умрёт вместе со мной!

examples.eng: the outing of a secret agent
They made the swap in secret.
give a secret to the Russians
She revealed the secret to us.
John and Mary court in secret.
She will not reveal the secret.
Their secret signal was a wink.
He was sent on a secret mission.
I can't tell you. It's a secret.
examples.ru: Я не могу вам рассказать. Это секрет.

examples.eng: one of nature's greatest secrets
She would not reveal the secret.
examples.ru: Она бы не выдала эту тайну.

examples.eng: He took that secret to the grave.
examples.ru: Он забрал эту тайну в могилу

examples.eng: I don't know the secret password.
the secret compartment in the desk

examples.ru: У каждого секретного агента есть кодовое имя.

examples.eng: The file was labelled 'Top Secret'.
